description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Autorelease testpypi that runs on pull requests to the stable branch. The workflow has two jobs: deploy_testpypi and test_testpypi. The deploy_testpypi job runs on ubuntu-latest, sets up Python 3.x, installs autorelease and release tools, bumps the dev version, builds and checks the package, and deploys it to testpypi. The test_testpypi job tests the deployed version and depends on deploy_testpypi.
